conditions.physical_address: NAWI Graz, Central Polymer Laboratories (CePoL), Institute of Chemistry, Karl-Franzens-University, Heinrichstrasse 28, Graz A-8010, Austria
conditions.evidence_text: A much better resolution could be achieved on the same column in 32 vol% acetone–water at the same temperature (Fig. 1). ... Both pumps were operated in the same mobile phase, which corresponds to the CAP for EO (32% acetone).
conditions.critical_condition_basis: Critical point of adsorption (CAP) for EO
conditions.notes: Used as the first dimension in 2-D LC for separation of PEG and PEG-MME based on end-group functionality.
